emails.subject: Re: PPL Montana shows lucrative profit
emails.body: Re: PPL Montana shows lucrative profit SHe has been holding against price caps, but is very nervous. She also is= =20 newly elected, so she may have to cave earlier than most. =09Jeff Dasovich =09Sent by: Jeff Dasovich =0904/09/2001 01:28 PM =09=09=20 =09=09
